name: Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells apparel in China. The company offers men's suits, coats, and shirts under the G73, JZZ, and G52 brands. It also provides uniforms under the GIUSEPPE brand. The company serves finance, energy, communications, electricity, tobacco, and other industries. Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Pingyang, China.
